languages.text: {n}Арджента даже отшатывается на миг. Затем ее темные глаза вспыхивают:{/n} "Как смеешь ты меня в чем-то упрекать?! Речь о пособничестве Хаосу! Человека, который себя им запятнал, ничем не оправдать!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Арджента даже отшатывается на миг. Затем ее темные глаза вспыхивают:{/n} "Как смеешь ты меня в чем-то упрекать?! Речь о пособничестве Хаосу! Человека, который себя им запятнал, ничем не оправдать!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury.{/n} "How dare you admonish me? We are talking about abetting Chaos! A person who has tainted themselves thus can never justify it!"
languages.original_text: {n}Арджента даже отшатывается на миг. Затем ее темные глаза вспыхивают:{/n} "Как смеешь ты меня в чем-то упрекать?! Речь о пособничестве Хаосу! Человека, который себя им запятнал, ничем не оправдать!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury:{/n} "How dare you reprehend me?! We are talking about abetting Chaos! A man who has tainted himself thus cannot be acquitted!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury:{/n} "How dare you reprehend me?! We are talking about abetting Chaos! A man who has tainted himself thus cannot be acquitted!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury.{/n} "How dare you admonish me? We are talking about abetting Chaos! A person who has tainted themselves thus can never justify it!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury.{/n} "How dare you admonish me? We are talking about abetting Chaos! A person who has tainted themselves thus can never justify it!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury.{/n} "How dare you admonish me? We are talking about abetting Chaos! A person who has tainted themselves thus can never justify it!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Argenta schreckt zurück, doch im nächsten Moment leuchten ihre dunklen Augen vor Wut auf.{/n} "Wie kannst du es wagen, mich zu ermahnen? Wir sprechen hier von Beihilfe zum Chaos! Ein Mensch, der sich so befleckt hat, kann dies niemals rechtfertigen!"
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury.{/n} "How dare you admonish me? We are talking about abetting Chaos! A person who has tainted themselves thus can never justify it!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta schreckt zurück, doch im nächsten Moment leuchten ihre dunklen Augen vor Wut auf.{/n} "Wie kannst du es wagen, mich zu ermahnen? Wir sprechen hier von Beihilfe zum Chaos! Ein Mensch, der sich so befleckt hat, kann dies niemals rechtfertigen!"

languages.text: {n}Argenta recule, mais l'instant d'après, ses yeux sombres s'illuminent de fureur.{/n} "Comment oses-tu me réprimander ? Nous parlons de complicité avec le chaos ! Une personne qui s'est souillée de la sorte ne peut jamais le justifier !"
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury.{/n} "How dare you admonish me? We are talking about abetting Chaos! A person who has tainted themselves thus can never justify it!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta recule, mais l'instant d'après, ses yeux sombres s'illuminent de fureur.{/n} "Comment oses-tu me réprimander ? Nous parlons de complicité avec le chaos ! Une personne qui s'est souillée de la sorte ne peut jamais le justifier !"

languages.text: {n}Argenta retrocede, pero al instante siguiente sus ojos oscuros se iluminan con furia.{/n} "¿Cómo te atreves a amonestarme? ¡Estamos hablando de instigar al Caos! Una persona que se ha manchado así jamás podrá justificarlo".
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury.{/n} "How dare you admonish me? We are talking about abetting Chaos! A person who has tainted themselves thus can never justify it!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta retrocede, pero al instante siguiente sus ojos oscuros se iluminan con furia.{/n} "¿Cómo te atreves a amonestarme? ¡Estamos hablando de instigar al Caos! Una persona que se ha manchado así jamás podrá justificarlo".

languages.text: {n}Argenta geri çekilir, ama bir an sonra kara gözleri öfkeyle parlar.{/n} "Beni uyarmaya nasıl cüret edersin? Kaos'a yataklık etmekten bahsediyoruz! Kendini bu şekilde lekeleyen bir kişi bunu asla haklı gösteremez!"
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta recoils, but the next moment her dark eyes light up with fury.{/n} "How dare you admonish me? We are talking about abetting Chaos! A person who has tainted themselves thus can never justify it!"
